scripts.tf:plan: pnpm build:zip && cd terraform && terraform plan
scripts.tf:apply: pnpm build:zip && cd terraform && terraform apply
scripts.deploy: pnpm build:zip && cd terraform && terraform apply -auto-approve
scripts.deploy:code: pnpm build:zip && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name magic-inbox-processor-prod --zip-file fileb://function.zip
